text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I wouldn't sleep somewhere like this. I was just
resting.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Yesterday... I could see the stars so clearly. It was
as if they were running alongside me, and...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, don't worry about me. I know myself
best, so...
